qids.subject: Data Structures
qids.prose: The following numbers are inserted into an empty binary search tree in the given order: . What is the height of the binary search tree (the height is the maximum distance of a leaf node from the root)? A. B. C. D.

qids.subject: Data Structures
qids.prose: A program takes as input a balanced binary search tree with leaf nodes and computes the value of a function for each node . If the cost of computing is: Then the worst-case time complexity of the program is? A. B. C. D.

qids.subject: Data Structures
qids.prose: Postorder traversal of a given binary search tree, produces the following sequence of keys Which one of the following sequences of keys can be the result of an in-order traversal of the tree ? A. B. C. D.

qids.subject: Data Structures
qids.prose: How many distinct binary search trees can be created out of distinct keys? A. B. C. D.

qids.subject: Data Structures
